mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (api_id, title, original_title, poster_url, backdrop_url, overview, release_date, rating, vote_count, synced_at) VALUES (#{apiId}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{posterUrl}, #{backdropUrl}, #{overview}, #{releaseDate}, #{rating}, #{voteCount}, #{syncedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE movies SET title = #{title}, original_title = #{originalTitle}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, backdrop_url = #{backdropUrl}, overview = #{overview}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, rating = #{rating}, vote_count = #{voteCount}, synced_at = #{syncedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, api_id, title, original_title, poster_url, backdrop_url, overview, release_date, rating, vote_count, synced_at, created_at, updated_at FROM movies WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, api_id, title, original_title, poster_url, backdrop_url, overview, release_date, rating, vote_count, synced_at, created_at, updated_at FROM movies WHERE api_id = #{apiId}
SELECT id, api_id, title, original_title, poster_url, backdrop_url, overview, release_date, rating, vote_count, synced_at, created_at, updated_at FROM movies ORDER BY synced_at DESC

SELECT id, api_id, title, original_title, poster_url, backdrop_url, overview, release_date, rating, vote_count, synced_at, created_at, updated_at FROM movies WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR original_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY vote_count DESC LIMIT 5
